content: Standard 2026 practice for publishing a React+three.js component package: package.json with peerDependencies for react/react-dom/three (not bundled), conditional exports map (types first, then import/require), tsup or tsdown for dual ESM/CJS plus .d.ts generation. Emerging 2026 guidance leans ESM-only for new packages since Node 23+ can require() ESM, but dual-publish remains the safer default while parts of the ecosystem still assume CJS interop.
